title: Adaptive Challenge Difficulty
summary: Track player skill based on performance metrics and generate adaptive challenges at their edge of competence. Adds a skill score system, skill-leveled challenge generation, a 'Push My Limits' button, and skill progression display in the Logic Profile.

tasks.description: Create SkillTracker class in main.js that calculates a player 'skill score' (0-100) from: levels completed (weight 30%), average stars (weight 25%), average solve time vs par (weight 20%), hint usage rate (weight 15%), gate efficiency (weight 10%). Store in localStorage under 'signal-circuit-skill'.
acceptance_criteria: SkillTracker class exists with calculate() method returning 0-100 score
Score factors in levels completed, avg stars, solve speed, hint usage, gate efficiency
Score persists to localStorage under 'signal-circuit-skill'
Score includes history array of {score, timestamp} entries (last 30)
Skill levels: Novice (0-30), Intermediate (31-60), Advanced (61-85), Expert (86-100)

tasks.description: Add getSkillLevel() method that returns { score, level, label, color } where level is one of 'novice', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'expert' with appropriate labels and colors.
acceptance_criteria: getSkillLevel() returns object with score, level string, human label, and color
Novice = green, Intermediate = cyan, Advanced = orange, Expert = gold
Method is accessible on GameState via this.skillTracker.getSkillLevel()

tasks.description: Create generateAdaptiveChallenge() function in levels.js that picks input/output count and truth table complexity based on skill score. Novice: 2x1 curated, Intermediate: 3x1 or 2x2, Advanced: 3x2, Expert: 4x1 or 4x2.
acceptance_criteria: generateAdaptiveChallenge(skillScore) function exists in levels.js
Novice range generates 2x1 curated patterns
Intermediate generates 3x1 or 2x2
Advanced generates 3x2
Expert generates 4x1 or 4x2
Returns a level object compatible with loadChallengeLevel()

tasks.description: Show 'Recommended for you' difficulty badge on generated challenges. Display the badge text and skill level indicator on the challenge pre-screen.
acceptance_criteria: Adaptive challenge shows a badge like '🎯 Recommended for Intermediate'
Badge is color-coded to match skill level color
Badge appears in the gameplay status bar when playing adaptive challenge

tasks.description: After solving an adaptive challenge, adjust skill score: fast solve with few gates = score up (1-3 points), using hints or many retries = score down (1-2 points). Update and persist after each completion.
acceptance_criteria: Completing adaptive challenge calls skillTracker.recordResult(gateCount, elapsed, hintsUsed, optimalGates)
Good performance (< 2x optimal gates, fast solve, no hints) increases score
Poor performance (> 3x optimal, slow, hints used) decreases score
Score is clamped to 0-100
History entry is added with new score

tasks.description: Track skill history over time and display a mini sparkline chart in the Logic Profile showing score progression over last 30 data points.
acceptance_criteria: Logic Profile modal shows a 'Skill Progression' section
Sparkline drawn as inline SVG polyline showing last 30 scores
Current skill level and score displayed prominently
Chart has labeled Y-axis range (0-100) and is color-coded by current level

tasks.description: Add 'Push My Limits' button on the Random Challenge config screen that generates a challenge one tier above the player's current skill level.
acceptance_criteria: Button labeled '💪 Push My Limits' appears on challenge config screen
Clicking it generates a challenge one tier harder than current skill
For Expert players, generates the hardest tier (4x2)
Button is styled distinctly (accent colored)

tasks.description: Add '🎯 Adaptive Challenge' button to the level select challenge section that starts an adaptive challenge at the player's current skill level.
acceptance_criteria: New '🎯 Adaptive Challenge' button in challenge-buttons section
Clicking it generates an adaptive challenge matching current skill
Mode is tracked for Explorer achievement

tasks.description: Ensure skill score persists across sessions via localStorage, initializing to 0 for new players and loading saved score on startup.
acceptance_criteria: Skill score loads from localStorage on GameState construction
New players start at score 0 (Novice)
Score survives page refresh
Score is included in export/import progress functions

tasks.description: Show skill level on the Logic Profile page with a progress bar to the next level, and add cache-bust version increment to v36.
acceptance_criteria: Logic Profile shows current skill level with progress bar to next tier
Progress bar shows percentage within current tier
Cache bust version updated to v36 in index.html and sw.js

testing_focus: Skill score calculation returns sensible values for various player states
Adaptive challenges scale correctly for each skill tier
Push My Limits generates harder challenges
Skill progression sparkline renders correctly in Logic Profile
New players start as Novice with appropriate challenges
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
